name: Grain

name: Iron
why_it_matters: Weapons, tools, armour, nails, bridges, wagons and siege equipment.

name: Horses

name: Salt
why_it_matters: Food preservation, army supply, trade, taxation, desert politics.

why_it_matters: Fortification, bridges, prestige buildings, roads and canals.

name: Silver/Coin metals

name: Medicinal herbs
why_it_matters: Hospitals, plague response, wound care, elite survival.
